prompt: Create a monochrome manga-style illustration of two elegant androgynous young men standing back-to-back in a refined fashion portrait. The left figure is taller, shown from mid-thigh up in a white suit jacket over a dark shirt and tie, with long pale hair tied in a low ponytail and loose bangs covering one eye; he holds an open ornate folding fan in front of his mouth and nose, the fan decorated with floral patterns, lace-like black edging, and a single large eye motif near the center. The right figure is slightly shorter, wearing a glossy black suit jacket with a white shirt and dark tie, with tousled pale wavy hair tied into a small low ponytail; he turns his face toward the viewer with delicate lashes and a calm, mysterious expression while adjusting or holding one wrist with slim elegant hands. Use fine black-and-white ink linework, soft grayscale shading, intricate hair strands, delicate facial features, high-fashion gothic elegance, subtle paper texture, and a clean off-white background with a thin double-line rectangular border near the edges. Keep the composition tightly framed, centered, balanced, and text-free, with exactly two characters and one visible folding fan. Allow the figures’ pale hair to remain mostly white with fine graphite shading. Character mood: poised, secretive, beautiful, slightly melancholic. Optional customization: make the left figure’s suit white, the right figure’s suit black, the characters’ hair pale platinum blonde, and the fan motif floral pattern with a single large eye.
promptEn: Create a monochrome manga-style illustration of two elegant androgynous young men standing back-to-back in a refined fashion portrait. The left figure is taller, shown from mid-thigh up in a white suit jacket over a dark shirt and tie, with long pale hair tied in a low ponytail and loose bangs covering one eye; he holds an open ornate folding fan in front of his mouth and nose, the fan decorated with floral patterns, lace-like black edging, and a single large eye motif near the center. The right figure is slightly shorter, wearing a glossy black suit jacket with a white shirt and dark tie, with tousled pale wavy hair tied into a small low ponytail; he turns his face toward the viewer with delicate lashes and a calm, mysterious expression while adjusting or holding one wrist with slim elegant hands. Use fine black-and-white ink linework, soft grayscale shading, intricate hair strands, delicate facial features, high-fashion gothic elegance, subtle paper texture, and a clean off-white background with a thin double-line rectangular border near the edges. Keep the composition tightly framed, centered, balanced, and text-free, with exactly two characters and one visible folding fan. Allow the figures’ pale hair to remain mostly white with fine graphite shading. Character mood: poised, secretive, beautiful, slightly melancholic. Optional customization: make the left figure’s suit white, the right figure’s suit black, the characters’ hair pale platinum blonde, and the fan motif floral pattern with a single large eye.
promptZh: 创作一幅单色漫画风格插画，描绘两位优雅的中性风青年在精致的时尚肖像中背靠背站立。左侧人物较高，呈现大腿中部以上的构图，身穿白色西装外套，内搭深色衬衫和领带，留着长长的浅色头发，扎成低马尾，凌乱的刘海遮住了一只眼睛；他手持一把打开的华丽折扇遮住口鼻，扇面装饰着花卉图案、蕾丝般的黑色边缘以及中心处的一只大眼睛图案。右侧人物稍矮，身穿亮面黑色西装外套，内搭白色衬衫和深色领带，留着凌乱的浅色波浪发，扎成一个小低马尾；他转头看向观众，睫毛纤长，表情平静而神秘，修长优雅的手正调整或握住另一只手腕。使用细腻的黑白墨水线条、柔和的灰度阴影、精致的发丝、细腻的面部特征、高级哥特时尚感、微妙的纸张纹理，以及带有边缘细双线矩形边框的干净灰白色背景。保持构图紧凑、居中、平衡且无文字，画面中仅包含两个角色和一把可见的折扇。人物的浅色头发应保持大部分为白色，并带有细腻的石墨色阴影。角色氛围：从容、神秘、美丽、略带忧郁。可选自定义：左侧人物的西装 白色，右侧人物的西装 黑色，角色的头发 浅铂金色，以及折扇图案 带有单只大眼睛的花卉图案。
